TREASURES FROM GOD’S WORD

1. It Matters Whom We Trust

(10 min.)

Those who put their trust in mere humans displease Jehovah (Isa 30:1, 2; Jer 17:5)

They will have a hard life (Jer 17:6; it “Juniper” No. 2)

Those who put their trust in Jehovah will flourish (Jer 17:7, 8; w09 3/1 17 ¶2)

2. Spiritual Gems

(10 min.)

  • Jer 17:7​—Why does trusting in Jehovah include trusting his human representatives? (w22.02 4 ¶7-8)

  • What spiritual gems from this week’s Bible reading would you like to share?

3. Bible Reading

(4 min.) Jer 17:5-18 (th study 5)

APPLY YOURSELF TO THE FIELD MINISTRY

4. Starting a Conversation

(3 min.) HOUSE TO HOUSE. Feature a video from the Teaching Toolbox. (lmd lesson 5 point 5)

5. Following Up

(4 min.) HOUSE TO HOUSE. Offer a Bible study. (lmd lesson 7 point 4)

6. Making Disciples

(5 min.) lff lesson 19 summary, review, and goal (lmd lesson 11 point 3)

LIVING AS CHRISTIANS

Song 54

7. Youths, Trust God’s Word for Practical Advice

(15 min.) Discussion.

If you are young and inexperienced, you are a favorite target of Satan. (Ge 3:1) Likely you face challenging situations almost every day at school. You can avoid much heartache by trusting in Jehovah and his Word for advice. For the following situations, write down a helpful Bible example or scripture.

  • Classmates make fun of you for being different

  • There is no one your age in the congregation to befriend

  • A classmate wants to communicate with you by phone or social media

  • A teacher tries to discourage you from pursuing a career in full-time service after graduation

Play the WHITEBOARD ANIMATION Can the Bible Really Help You? Then ask the audience:

  • What lessons did you learn from the video?

TRY THIS: Take the Bible reading challenge! Every day read one chapter and then research something that you want to know more about. See how many days in a row you can do that. Because this trains you to think like Jesus, you will know what to do when faced with situations that require a quick response.​—1Co 2:16.

8. Congregation Bible Study

(30 min.) lfb lessons 102-103

Concluding Comments (3 min.) | Song 22 and Prayer
